chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1292 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.1433/2022 (151 CPC) 2. For hearing of main case 05.12.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Learned Counsel for the petitioner has already filed a statement of withdrawal of this petition dated 02.03.2022. Therefore, this petition is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
